overall.description: Static first-person view from inside a cyberpunk apartment during golden hour sunset. The room features a messy bed, a television displaying various programs, and warm sunlight filtering through window blinds overlooking palm trees. This is gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk apartment bedroom with entertainment system

agents.ego_description: stationary in the apartment, watching the television as it cycles through different programs

entered.detail: curved ceiling with parallel wooden slats creating a warm architectural feature overhead
large industrial window with horizontal blinds partially open, revealing sunset and palm trees outside
unmade bed with rumpled white sheets and pillows in the foreground
flatscreen TV displaying various broadcast programs including news and entertainment shows
papers and magazines strewn across the bed sheets
glowing green and blue neon poster or digital display on the wall above the entertainment unit

segments.scene_description: A static first-person view of a cyberpunk apartment bedroom bathed in warm golden hour sunlight. The camera faces a large window with blinds that reveal a sunset view with palm trees silhouetted outside. To the left is a messy bed with scattered magazines, while to the right a television cycles through various programs including news broadcasts. The room features a distinctive curved wooden slat ceiling and neon wall decorations, creating a cozy yet high-tech atmosphere typical of Night City residential spaces.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static first-person perspective within a cyberpunk bedroom that captures the stillness of a golden hour sunset. It begins by focusing on the warm, amber light filtering through window blinds, which frame the silhouettes of palm trees against a fading sky. As the eye wanders from the window, the view encompasses a messy bed cluttered with magazines to the left and a television cycling through news broadcasts to the right. The scene then settles on the architectural details of the room, highlighting the contrast between the curved wooden slat ceiling and the glowing neon wall decorations. Finally, the composition lingers on the blend of domestic clutter and high-tech aesthetics that define this cozy Night City residential space.
